name: Lust Blaze
outcome: [AttackerName] weaves her arms and legs in acrobatic motions as blue flames wreath their limbs before sending out a surge of pleasurable erotic fire that floods [TargetName]'s body with needy pulsing heat as it licks across [TargetHimOrHer] in a strange caress.
miss: [AttackerName] weaves her arms and legs in acrobatic motions as blue flames wreath their limbs before sending out a surge of pleasurable erotic fire, [TargetHeOrShe] deftly avoids the magical inferno!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind spins with dizzying lust from the dissipating flames, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] strangely charmed!
